verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ cum audisset Jabin rex Asor, misit ad Jobab regem Madon, et ad regem Semeron, atque ad regem Achsaph :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֕י כִּשְׁמֹ֖עַ יָבִ֣ין מֶלֶךְ־חָצ֑וֹר וַיִּשְׁלַ֗ח אֶל־יוֹבָב֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ מָד֔וֹן וְאֶל־מֶ֥לֶךְ שִׁמְר֖וֹן וְאֶל־מֶ֥לֶךְ אַכְשָֽׁף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Jabin king of Asor had heard these things, he sent to Jobab king of Madon, and to the king of Semeron, and to the king of Achsaph:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui, että kuin Jobin Hatsorin kuningas sen kuuli, lähetti hän Jobabin Madonin kuninkaan tykö, ja Simronin kuninkaan, ja Akasaphin kuninkaan tykö,
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when Jabin king of Hazor had heard those things, that he sent to Jobab king of Madon, and to the king of Shimron, and to the king of Achshaph,

verses.latin_vulgate: ad reges quoque aquilonis, qui habitabant in montanis et in planitie contra meridiem Ceneroth, in campestribus quoque et in regionibus Dor juxta mare :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֶל־הַמְּלָכִ֞ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר מִצְּפ֗וֹן בָּהָ֧ר וּבָעֲרָבָ֛ה נֶ֥גֶב כִּֽנְר֖וֹת וּבַשְּׁפֵלָ֑ה וּבְנָפ֥וֹת דּ֖וֹר מִיָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to the kings of the north, that dwelt in the mountains and in the plains over against the south side of Ceneroth, and in the levels and the countries of Dor by the sea side:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niiden kuningasten tykö, jotka asuivat pohjan puolella vuorella, ja lakeudella, meren puolella Kinerotista, ja laaksoissa, ja Dorin Naphotissa meren puolella,
verses.king_james: And to the kings that were on the north of the mountains, and of the plains south of Chinneroth, and in the valley, and in the borders of Dor on the west,

verses.latin_vulgate: Chananæum quoque ab oriente et occidente, et Amorrhæum atque Hethæum ac Pherezæum et Jebusæum in montanis : Hevæum quoque qui habitabat ad radices Hermon in terra Maspha.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽכְּנַעֲנִי֙ מִמִּזְרָ֣ח וּמִיָּ֔ם וְהָאֱמֹרִ֧י וְהַחִתִּ֛י וְהַפְּרִזִּ֥י וְהַיְבוּסִ֖י בָּהָ֑ר וְהַֽחִוִּי֙ תַּ֣חַת חֶרְמ֔וֹן בְּאֶ֖רֶץ הַמִּצְפָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: To the Chanaanites also on the east and on the west, and the Amorrhite, and the Hethite, and the Pherezite, and the Jebusite in the mountains: to the Hevite also who dwelt at the foot of Hermon in the land of Maspha.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kanaanealaisten tykö idän ja lännen puoleen, Amorilaisten, Hetiläisten, Pheresiläisten ja Jebusilaisten tykö vuorelle, niin hyös Heviläisten tykö alapuolella Hermonin vuorta Mitspan maakunnassa.
verses.king_james: And to the Canaanite on the east and on the west, and to the Amorite, and the Hittite, and the Perizzite, and the Jebusite in the mountains, and to the Hivite under Hermon in the land of Mizpeh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressique sunt omnes cum turmis suis, populus multus nimis sicut arena quæ est in littore maris, equi quoque et currus immensæ multitudinis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצְא֣וּ הֵ֗ם וְכׇל־מַֽחֲנֵיהֶם֙ עִמָּ֔ם עַם־רָ֕ב כַּח֛וֹל אֲשֶׁ֥ר עַל־שְׂפַֽת־הַיָּ֖ם לָרֹ֑ב וְס֥וּס וָרֶ֖כֶב רַב־מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they all came out with their troops, a people exceeding numerous as the sand that is on the sea shore, their horses also and chariots a very great multitude,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämät läksivät kaiken sotajoukkonsa kanssa, joka oli sangen suuri kansan paljous, niinkuin santa meren rannalla paljouden tähden, ja sangen monta hevosta ja vaunua.
verses.king_james: And they went out, they and all their hosts with them, much people, even as the sand that is upon the sea shore in multitude, with horses and chariots very many.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conveneruntque omnes reges isti in unum ad aquas Merom, ut pugnarent contra Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּוָּ֣עֲד֔וּ כֹּ֖ל הַמְּלָכִ֣ים הָאֵ֑לֶּה וַיָּבֹ֜אוּ וַיַּחֲנ֤וּ יַחְדָּו֙ אֶל־מֵ֣י מֵר֔וֹם לְהִלָּחֵ֖ם עִם־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And all these kings assembled together at the waters of Merom, to fight against Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki nämät kuninkaat kokoontuivat ja he tulivat ja sioittivat heitänsä yhteen Meromin vetten tykönä, sotimaan Israelia vastaan.
verses.king_james: And when all these kings were met together, they came and pitched together at the waters of Merom, to fight against Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad Josue : Ne timeas eos : cras enim hac eadem hora ego tradam omnes istos vulnerandos in conspectu Israël : equos eorum subnervabis, et currus igne combures.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֣ה אֶל־יְהוֹשֻׁ֘עַ֮ אַל־תִּירָ֣א מִפְּנֵיהֶם֒ כִּֽי־מָחָ֞ר כָּעֵ֣ת הַזֹּ֗את אָנֹכִ֞י נֹתֵ֧ן אֶת־כֻּלָּ֛ם חֲלָלִ֖ים לִפְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אֶת־סוּסֵיהֶ֣ם תְּעַקֵּ֔ר וְאֶת־מַרְכְּבֹתֵיהֶ֖ם תִּשְׂרֹ֥ף בָּאֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Joshua: Fear them not: for to morrow at this same hour I will deliver all these to be slain in the sight of Israel: thou shalt hamstring their horses, and thou shalt burn their chariots with fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi Josualle: älä heitä ensinkään pelkää, sillä huomenna tällä ajalla minä annan heidät kaikki lyötynä Israelin kansan eteen; heidän hevosensa pitää sinun rivinomaksi tekemän ja heidän vaununsa tulella polttaman.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Joshua, Be not afraid because of them: for to morrow about this time will I deliver them up all slain before Israel: thou shalt hough their horses, and burn their chariots with fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venitque Josue, et omnis exercitus cum eo, adversus illos ad aquas Merom subito, et irruerunt super eos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֣א יְהוֹשֻׁ֡עַ וְכׇל־עַם֩ הַמִּלְחָמָ֨ה עִמּ֧וֹ עֲלֵיהֶ֛ם עַל־מֵ֥י מֵר֖וֹם פִּתְאֹ֑ם וַֽיִּפְּל֖וּ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joshua came, and all the army with him, against them to the waters of Merom on a sudden, and fell upon them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua tuli ja kaikki sotajoukko hänen kanssansa äkisti heidän päällensä, Meromin vetten tykönä, ja karkasivat heidän päällensä.
verses.king_james: So Joshua came, and all the people of war with him, against them by the waters of Merom suddenly; and they fell upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: tradiditque illos Dominus in manus Israël. Qui percusserunt eos, et persecuti sunt usque ad Sidonem magnam, et aquas Maserephoth, campumque Masphe, qui est ad orientalem illius partem. Ita percussit omnes, ut nullas dimitteret ex eis reliquias :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנֵ֨ם יְהֹוָ֥ה בְּיַֽד־יִשְׂרָאֵל֮ וַיַּכּוּם֒ וַֽיִּרְדְּפ֞וּם עַד־צִיד֣וֹן רַבָּ֗ה וְעַד֙ מִשְׂרְפ֣וֹת מַ֔יִם וְעַד־בִּקְעַ֥ת מִצְפֶּ֖ה מִזְרָ֑חָה וַיַּכֻּ֕ם עַד־בִּלְתִּ֥י הִשְׁאִיר־לָהֶ֖ם שָׂרִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord delivered them into the hands of Israel. And they defeated them, and chased them as far as the great Sidon and the waters of Maserophot, and the field of Masphe, which is on the east thereof. He slew them all, so as to leave no remains of them:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra antoi heidät israelin käsiin, ja he löivät heitä, ja ajoivat heitä takaa isoon Zidoniin asti, ja lämpimään veteen asti, ja Mitspan ketoon asti, itään päin, ja löivät heitä siihenasti, ettei yksikään heistä jäänyt.
verses.king_james: And the Lord delivered them into the hand of Israel, who smote them, and chased them unto great Zidon, and unto Misrephoth–maim, and unto the valley of Mizpeh eastward; and they smote them, until they left them none remaining.

verses.latin_vulgate: fecitque sicut præceperat ei Dominus : equos eorum subnervavit, currusque combussit igni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֤עַשׂ לָהֶם֙ יְהוֹשֻׁ֔עַ כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר אָמַר־ל֖וֹ יְהֹוָ֑ה אֶת־סוּסֵיהֶ֣ם עִקֵּ֔ר וְאֶת־מַרְכְּבֹתֵיהֶ֖ם שָׂרַ֥ף בָּאֵֽשׁ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he did as the Lord had commanded him, he hamstringed their horses and burned their chariots.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin teki myös Josua heille, niinkuin Herra oli hänelle käskenyt, ja teki rivinomaksi heidän hevosensa ja poltti heidän vaununsa tulella.
verses.king_james: And Joshua did unto them as the Lord bade him: he houghed their horses, and burnt their chariots with fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reversusque statim cepit Asor, et regem ejus percussit gladio. Asor enim antiquitus inter omnia regna hæc principatum tenebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨שׇׁב יְהוֹשֻׁ֜עַ בָּעֵ֤ת הַהִיא֙ וַיִּלְכֹּ֣ד אֶת־חָצ֔וֹר וְאֶת־מַלְכָּ֖הּ הִכָּ֣ה בֶחָ֑רֶב כִּֽי־חָצ֣וֹר לְפָנִ֔ים הִ֕יא רֹ֖אשׁ כׇּל־הַמַּמְלָכ֥וֹת הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And presently turning back he took Asor: and slew the king thereof with the sword. Now Asor of old was the head of all these kingdoms.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua palasi sillä ajalla ja voitti Hatsorin ja löi hänen kuninkaansa miekalla; sillä Hatsor oli ennen kaikkein näiden valtakuntain pääkaupunki.
verses.king_james: And Joshua at that time turned back, and took Hazor, and smote the king thereof with the sword: for Hazor beforetime was the head of all those kingdoms.

verses.latin_vulgate: Percussitque omnes animas quæ ibidem morabantur : non dimisit in ea ullas reliquias, sed usque ad internecionem universa vastavit, ipsamque urbem peremit incendio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יַּכּ֠וּ אֶת־כׇּל־הַנֶּ֨פֶשׁ אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֤הּ לְפִי־חֶ֙רֶב֙ הַחֲרֵ֔ם לֹ֥א נוֹתַ֖ר כׇּל־נְשָׁמָ֑ה וְאֶת־חָצ֖וֹר שָׂרַ֥ף בָּאֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he cut off all the souls that abode there: he left not in it any remains, but utterly destroyed all, and burned the city itself with fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he löivät kaikki ne sielut, jotka siellä olivat, miekan terällä, ja tappoivat, niin ettei yhtäkään jäänyt, jolla henki oli, ja poltti Hatsorin tulella.
verses.king_james: And they smote all the souls that were therein with the edge of the sword, utterly destroying them: there was not any left to breathe: and he burnt Hazor with fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omnes per circuitum civitates, regesque earum, cepit, percussit atque delevit, sicut præceperat ei Moyses famulus Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֶת־כׇּל־עָרֵ֣י הַמְּלָֽכִים־הָ֠אֵ֠לֶּה וְֽאֶת־כׇּל־מַלְכֵיהֶ֞ם לָכַ֧ד יְהוֹשֻׁ֛עַ וַיַּכֵּ֥ם לְפִי־חֶ֖רֶב הֶחֱרִ֣ים אוֹתָ֑ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר צִוָּ֔ה מֹשֶׁ֖ה עֶ֥בֶד יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took and put to the sword and destroyed all the cities round about, and their kings, as Moses the servant of God had commanded him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikkein niiden kuningasten kaupungit voitti Josua, kaikkein heidän kuningastensa kanssa, ja löi heitä miekan terällä, ja tappoi heidät, niinkuin Moses Herran palvelia käskenyt oli.
verses.king_james: And all the cities of those kings, and all the kings of them, did Joshua take, and smote them with the edge of the sword, and he utterly destroyed them, as Moses the servant of the Lord commanded.

verses.latin_vulgate: Absque urbibus, quæ erant in collibus et in tumulis sitæ, ceteras succendit Israël : unam tantum Asor munitissimam flamma consumpsit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֣ק כׇּל־הֶעָרִ֗ים הָעֹֽמְדוֹת֙ עַל־תִּלָּ֔ם לֹ֥א שְׂרָפָ֖ם יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל זוּלָתִ֛י אֶת־חָצ֥וֹר לְבַדָּ֖הּ שָׂרַ֥ף יְהוֹשֻֽׁעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Except the cities that were on hills and high places, the rest Israel burned: only Asor that was very strong he consumed with fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Israelin lapset ei polttaneet yhtäkään kaupunkia, jotka seisoivat töyräillänsä, paitsi ainoaa Hatsoria, jonka Josua poltti.
verses.king_james: But as for the cities that stood still in their strength, Israel burned none of them, save Hazor only; that did Joshua burn.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnemque prædam istarum urbium ac jumenta diviserunt sibi filii Israël, cunctis hominibus interfectis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠כֹ֠ל שְׁלַ֞ל הֶעָרִ֤ים הָאֵ֙לֶּה֙ וְהַבְּהֵמָ֔ה בָּזְז֥וּ לָהֶ֖ם בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל רַ֣ק אֶֽת־כׇּל־הָאָדָ֞ם הִכּ֣וּ לְפִי־חֶ֗רֶב עַד־הִשְׁמִדָם֙ אוֹתָ֔ם לֹ֥א הִשְׁאִ֖ירוּ כׇּל־נְשָׁמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of Israel divided among themselves all the spoil of these cities and the cattle, killing all the men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaiken saaliin ja eläimet, jotka he näistä kaupungeista olivat ottaneet, jakoivat Israelin lapset keskenänsä. Ainoasti kaikki ihmiset tappoivat he miekan terällä, siihenasti että he hukuttivat heidät, niin ettei yhtäkään elävää henkeä jäänyt,
verses.king_james: And all the spoil of these cities, and the cattle, the children of Israel took for a prey unto themselves; but every man they smote with the edge of the sword, until they had destroyed them, neither left they any to breathe.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut præceperat Dominus Moysi servo suo, ita præcepit Moyses Josue, et ille universa complevit : non præteriit de universis mandatis, nec unum quidem verbum quod jusserat Dominus Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר צִוָּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־מֹשֶׁ֣ה עַבְדּ֔וֹ כֵּן־צִוָּ֥ה מֹשֶׁ֖ה אֶת־יְהוֹשֻׁ֑עַ וְכֵן֙ עָשָׂ֣ה יְהוֹשֻׁ֔עַ לֹא־הֵסִ֣יר דָּבָ֔ר מִכֹּ֛ל אֲשֶׁר־צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: As the Lord had commanded Moses his servant, so did Moses command Joshua, and he accomplished all: he left not one thing undone of all the commandments which the Lord had commanded Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niinkuin Herra palveliallensa Mosekselle käskenyt oli, ja Moses oli Josualle käskenyt. Ja niin Josua teki, ettei niistä yhtäkään tekemätä jäänyt, mitä Herra Mosekselle käskenyt oli.
verses.king_james: As the Lord commanded Moses his servant, so did Moses command Joshua, and so did Joshua; he left nothing undone of all that the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cepit itaque Josue omnem terram montanam et meridianam, terramque Gosen, et planitiem, et occidentalem plagam, montemque Israël, et campestria ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֨ח יְהוֹשֻׁ֜עַ אֶת־כׇּל־הָאָ֣רֶץ הַזֹּ֗את הָהָ֤ר וְאֶת־כׇּל־הַנֶּ֙גֶב֙ וְאֵת֙ כׇּל־אֶ֣רֶץ הַגֹּ֔שֶׁן וְאֶת־הַשְּׁפֵלָ֖ה וְאֶת־הָעֲרָבָ֑ה וְאֶת־הַ֥ר יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל וּשְׁפֵלָתֹֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Joshua took all the country of the hills, and of the south, and the land of Gosen, and the plains and the west country, and the mountain of Israel, and the plains thereof:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua otti kaiken tämän maakunnan, vuorimaan, ja kaiken Etelämaan, ja kaiken Gosenin maan ja kedot sekä myös laaksot, ja Israelin vuoret laaksoinensa,
verses.king_james: So Joshua took all that land, the hills, and all the south country, and all the land of Goshen, and the valley, and the plain, and the mountain of Israel, and the valley of the same;

verses.latin_vulgate: et partem montis, quæ ascendit Seir usque Baalgad, per planitiem Libani subter montem Hermon : omnes reges eorum cepit, percussit, et occidit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־הָהָ֤ר הֶֽחָלָק֙ הָעוֹלֶ֣ה שֵׂעִ֔יר וְעַד־בַּ֤עַל גָּד֙ בְּבִקְעַ֣ת הַלְּבָנ֔וֹן תַּ֖חַת הַר־חֶרְמ֑וֹן וְאֵ֤ת כׇּל־מַלְכֵיהֶם֙ לָכַ֔ד וַיַּכֵּ֖ם וַיְמִיתֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And part of the mountain that goeth up to Seir as far as Baalgad, by the plain of Libanus under mount Hermon: all their kings he took, smote and slew.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siitä sileästä vuoresta, joka menee ylös Seiriin päin BaalGadiin asti Libanonin laaksossa, Hermonin vuoren alapuolella: kaikki heidän kuninkaansa voitti hän, löi ja tappoi heidät.
verses.king_james: Even from the mount Halak, that goeth up to Seir, even unto Baal–gad in the valley of Lebanon under mount Hermon: and all their kings he took, and smote them, and slew them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multo tempore pugnavit Josue contra reges istos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָמִ֣ים רַבִּ֗ים עָשָׂ֧ה יְהוֹשֻׁ֛עַ אֶת־כׇּל־הַמְּלָכִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה מִלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Joshua made war a long time against these kings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kauvan aikaa soti Josua kaikkein näiden kuningasten kanssa.
verses.king_james: Joshua made war a long time with all those kings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non fuit civitas quæ se traderet filiis Israël, præter Hevæum, qui habitabat in Gabaon : omnes enim bellando cepit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־הָיְתָ֣ה עִ֗יר אֲשֶׁ֤ר הִשְׁלִ֙ימָה֙ אֶל־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל בִּלְתִּ֥י הַחִוִּ֖י יֹשְׁבֵ֣י גִבְע֑וֹן אֶת־הַכֹּ֖ל לָקְח֥וּ בַמִּלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: There was not a city that delivered itself to the children of Israel, except the Hevite, who dwelt in Gabaon: for he took all by fight.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei ollut yhtäkään kaupunkia, joka rauhalla itsensä antoi Israelin lasten alle, paitsi Heviläisiä, jotka asuivat Gibeonissa; mutta kaikki he ottivat sodalla.
verses.king_james: There was not a city that made peace with the children of Israel, save the Hivites the inhabitants of Gibeon: all other they took in battle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domini enim sententia fuerat, ut indurarentur corda eorum, et pugnarent contra Israël, et caderent, et non mererentur ullam clementiam, ac perirent, sicut præceperat Dominus Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י מֵאֵ֣ת יְהֹוָ֣ה ׀ הָיְתָ֡ה לְחַזֵּ֣ק אֶת־לִבָּם֩ לִקְרַ֨את הַמִּלְחָמָ֤ה אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ לְמַ֣עַן הַחֲרִימָ֔ם לְבִלְתִּ֥י הֱיוֹת־לָהֶ֖ם תְּחִנָּ֑ה כִּ֚י לְמַ֣עַן הַשְׁמִידָ֔ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: For it was the sentence of the Lord, that their hearts should be hardened, and they should fight against Israel, and fall, and should not deserve any clemency, and should be destroyed as the Lord had commanded Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se tapahtui niin Herralta, että heidän sydämensä oli niin paatunut, että he kohtasivat Israelin sodalla, että hän heidät tappais, ja ei yhtäkään armoa heille tapahtuisi, vaan että hän hukuttais heidät, niinkuin Herra Mosekselle käskenyt oli.
verses.king_james: For it was of the Lord to harden their hearts, that they should come against Israel in battle, that he might destroy them utterly, and that they might have no favour, but that he might destroy them, as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: In illo tempore venit Josue, et interfecit Enacim de montanis, Hebron, et Dabir, et Anab, et de omni monte Juda et Israël, urbesque eorum delevit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֨א יְהוֹשֻׁ֜עַ בָּעֵ֣ת הַהִ֗יא וַיַּכְרֵ֤ת אֶת־הָעֲנָקִים֙ מִן־הָהָ֤ר מִן־חֶבְרוֹן֙ מִן־דְּבִ֣ר מִן־עֲנָ֔ב וּמִכֹּל֙ הַ֣ר יְהוּדָ֔ה וּמִכֹּ֖ל הַ֣ר יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל עִם־עָרֵיהֶ֖ם הֶחֱרִימָ֥ם יְהוֹשֻֽׁעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: At that time Joshua came and cut off the Enancims from the mountains, from Hebron, and Dabir, and Anab, and from all the mountain of Juda and Israel, and destroyed their cities.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siihen aikaan tuli Josua ja hävitti Enakilaiset vuorelta, Hebronista, Debiristä, Anabista ja kaikilta Juudan vuorilta ja kaikilta Israelin vuorilta, ja tappoi heidät kaupunkeinensa,
verses.king_james: And at that time came Joshua, and cut off the Anakims from the mountains, from Hebron, from Debir, from Anab, and from all the mountains of Judah, and from all the mountains of Israel: Joshua destroyed them utterly with their cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non reliquit ullum de stirpe Enacim, in terra filiorum Israël : absque civitatibus Gaza, et Geth, et Azoto, in quibus solis relicti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־נוֹתַ֣ר עֲנָקִ֔ים בְּאֶ֖רֶץ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל רַ֗ק בְּעַזָּ֛ה בְּגַ֥ת וּבְאַשְׁדּ֖וֹד נִשְׁאָֽרוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He left not any of the stock of the Enacims, in the land of the children of Israel: except the cities of Gaza, and Geth, and Azotus, in which alone they were left.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ei antanut yhtäkään Enakilaista jäädä Israelin lasten maalle, paitsi Gasassa, Gatissa ja Asdodissa, joihin he jäivät.
verses.king_james: There was none of the Anakims left in the land of the children of Israel: only in Gaza, in Gath, and in Ashdod, there remained.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cepit ergo Josue omnem terram, sicut locutus est Dominus ad Moysen, et tradidit eam in possessionem filiis Israël secundum partes et tribus suas : quievitque terra a præliis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֨ח יְהוֹשֻׁ֜עַ אֶת־כׇּל־הָאָ֗רֶץ כְּ֠כֹ֠ל אֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבֶּ֣ר יְהֹוָה֮ אֶל־מֹשֶׁה֒ וַיִּתְּנָהּ֩ יְהוֹשֻׁ֨עַ לְנַחֲלָ֧ה לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל כְּמַחְלְקֹתָ֖ם לְשִׁבְטֵיהֶ֑ם וְהָאָ֥רֶץ שָׁקְטָ֖ה מִמִּלְחָמָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: So Joshua took all the land, as the Lord spoke to Moses, and delivered it in possession to the children of Israel, according to their divisions and tribes. And the land rested from wars.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niin Josua otti kaiken maakunnan, peräti niin kuin Herra Mosekselle oli sanonut, ja antoi Israelille perinnöksi, kullekin sukukunnalle osansa; ja maakunta lakkasi sotimasta.
verses.king_james: So Joshua took the whole land, according to all that the Lord said unto Moses; and Joshua gave it for an inheritance unto Israel according to their divisions by their tribes. And the land rested from war.
